protein_name: May play important roles in selective fasciculation and zone-to-zone projection of the primary olfactory axons. Expressed most strongly in adult and fetal brain. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Protein type: Cell adhesion; Membrane protein, integral; Motility/polarity/chemotaxis
